remarks: Exceptional Mediterranean Colonial Estate in one of Stamford's most sought-after neighborhoods, offering over 3,000 sq' of beautifully updated living space & resort-style grounds. Enhanced throughout in 2025, this move-in-ready home blends timeless architecture with sophisticated modern design. A grand foyer w/radiant-heated designer floors leads to a stunning chef's kitchen featuring marble counters, Sub-Zero fridge, stainless air-fry oven, designer hood, hidden wine storage, & seamless flow to the dining room & sunroom overlooking the backyard oasis. The main level includes two spacious bedrooms & a luxurious marble bath, ideal for guests, in-laws, au pair accommodations, or future ADU potential. Upstairs, enjoy an exceptional entertainment level with an oversized Living room w/marble fireplace, inset TV, expansive game room, & a hidden Pink Himalayan salt chamber creating a unique wellness retreat. Impressive Primary Suite incl Hidden dressing room, balcony, & marble spa bath. Addl bedroom and marble full bath & office. Outside, relax in your private resort featuring a new sunken pool, custom decking, gazebo, outdoor kitchen, prof landscaping, & exceptional privacy. Addl upgrades include fully paid & insured solar panels, new HVAC & water heater, Brinks security & camera system, & an extended kitchen. Conveniently located minutes from Metro-North, downtown Stamford, fine dining, shopping, & the Merritt Parkway, this turnkey estate offers luxury, lifestyle, and convenience.
